summary: The Trump administration is poised to start building a 30-foot (9-meter) border wall in part of a Texas state park, confirming plans that have stoked a surge of local opposition.

title: US Stocks Give Up Jobs Report-Related Gains as Semis Pull Back
title_cn: 随着半成品价格回落，美国股市放弃了就业报告相关的涨幅

title: Refiner Profits Are Soaring in Sign of Lingering Hormuz Snarls
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡问题挥之不去，炼油厂利润飙升
summary: US crude refiners are enjoying some of the best profit margins in years, the latest sign that even as energy shipments pick up through the Strait of Hormuz, there are lingering supply-chain kinks still rippling through global markets.

title: Iran’s Floating Oil Hoard Swells
title_cn: 伊朗浮动石油储备激增
summary:
Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Commodity Strategist Mike McGlone says the oil fluctuations are part of a "normal cycle" 
A hoard of Iranian oil is building up at sea, as the Islamic Republic struggles to find buyers before the expiry of a 60-day window granted by Washington.
More than 20 million barrels of Iranian crude have been idling in Asian waters for at least seven days, up nearly 18% from a week earlier, according to Kpler Ltd. Estimates for the overall volume of the country’s oil on water — either in transit or stationary — have ranged from 58 million to 68 million barrels since the US sanctions waiver kicked in last week, according to data from Vortexa and Bloomberg calculations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Financial Disclosure Shows 21,000 Trades in 2025
title_cn: 特朗普财务披露显示 2025 年将进行 21,000 笔交易
summary: President Donald Trump made more than 21,000 securities trades in his first year back in office, often in intense bursts tied to market events he created.

title_cn: 卡尼将维持不列颠哥伦比亚省北部油轮禁令，艾伯塔省将公布管道提案
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects in Canada’s west coast province of British Columbia.

title: ECB Made Right Choice on Rate Hike, Lagarde Tells Les Echos
title_cn: 拉加德告诉《回声报》，欧洲央行在加息方面做出了正确的选择
summary: The European Central Bank was correct to raise interest rates when it did last month, President Christine Lagarde told Les Echos.

title: S&P 500 Erases Jobs-Fueled Gain as Chipmakers Sink: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商的下滑，标准普尔 500 指数抹去了就业推动的涨幅：市场总结
summary: A selloff in chipmakers weighed on stocks while short-dated bonds rose as a slower-than-anticipated increase in US jobs bolstered bets the Federal Reserve won’t raise rates any time soon.

title: Prison Phone Company Aventiv Clears Hurdle for Lenders’ Takeover
title_cn: 监狱电话公司 Aventiv 为贷款人收购扫清障碍
summary: Aventiv Technologies has clinched an out-of court deal for lenders to take control of the prison phone company from private equity firm Platinum Equity, capping a lengthy slog to clear regulatory approval, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Oil Continues Slide as Crude Flows Surge Through Persian Gulf
title_cn: 随着波斯湾原油流量激增，油价继续下滑
summary: Oil deepened its slide below pre-war levels as flows from the Persian Gulf soared, heightening the prospect of a supply surplus.

title: Germany Should Stop Shutting Off Coal Plants, Grid Operator Says
title_cn: 电网运营商称德国应停止关闭燃煤电厂
summary: Germany should stop further closures of coal-fed power plants for now to safeguard electricity supplies amid the expansion of renewable generation, grid operator Amprion GmbH urged.

title: How AI Creates Jobs
title_cn: 人工智能如何创造就业机会
summary: Lisa Simon, Chief Economist at Revelio Labs joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why a weaker-than-expected jobs report doesn't tell the whole story. Using hiring data from LinkedIn, Glassdoor, H-1B visa filings, she argues AI is helping fuel hiring, She explains why companies investing most heavily in AI are expanding both entry-level and experienced roles. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech, Finance Titans Redraw Stablecoin Map in Threat to Circle
title_cn: 科技、金融巨头重新绘制稳定币版图，对 Circle 构成威胁
summary: For years, the stablecoin race has been defined by a simple objective: build the dominant digital dollar. This week’s turbulence in Circle Internet Group Inc.’s shares suggests investors are beginning to price a different future — one in which the biggest rewards may accrue not to the companies issuing stablecoins, but to those controlling how they move.

title: Soybeans Drift as China Buying Awaited After US Tariff Statement
title_cn: 美国关税声明公布后等待中国采购，大豆价格波动
summary: Soybean futures drifted between small gains and losses as traders weighed a statement by China’s government on rolling back tariffs on US agricultural products, a move that could pave the way for purchases by the Asian country.

title: Cboe Seeks to List Prediction Market Type Options on Earnings Metrics
title_cn: 芝加哥期权交易所寻求列出盈利指标的预测市场类型选项
summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. is seeking US regulatory approval to list all-or-nothing options tied to corporate earnings results, allowing traders to wager on figures ranging from SpaceX revenue and Nvidia data-center sales to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s credit-loss provisions.

title: Amazon to Begin Internet Service This Year After Latest Launch
title_cn: 亚马逊将于今年推出最新互联网服务
summary: A United Launch Alliance rocket lofted 29 satellites for Amazon.com Inc., paving the way for the start of the company’s broadband service later this year in a challenge to SpaceX’s dominant Starlink network.

title: Fuel Shortages Stall Venezuela Rescue Efforts as Cranes Sit Idle
title_cn: 由于起重机闲置，燃料短缺导致委内瑞拉救援工作陷入停滞
summary: Excavators and cranes ground to a halt at some rescue sites in Venezuela as fuel shortages hampered recovery efforts after last week’s earthquake, leaving crews unable to clear debris in some of the hardest-hit areas of La Guaira state.

title: Why Can’t Airports Quit Smoking Lounges?
title_cn: 为什么机场休息室不能戒烟？
summary:
There’s one place in the world that can’t seem to quit smoking: airports.

Morgan Meaker explains how smoking lounges remain strange holdouts in a world growing more hostile to cigarettes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Says Saylor’s Strategy Adds New Risk to Bitcoin Market
title_cn: 摩根大通表示塞勒的策略给比特币市场增加了新的风险
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. warns that Michael Saylor’s financing overhaul at Strategy Inc. has shaken up the dynamics of the Bitcoin market by introducing the risk that one of the cryptocurrency’s biggest buyers could also become a seller, adding a new source of uncertainty for investors.

title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
title_cn: 查看巴西本周的热点话题
summary: Confira com Daniel Carvalho os assuntos que foram destaque da semana no Brasil. Com edição de Patricia Xavier e produção de Gisele Fernandes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks Off to Rough Start in Third Quarter With 2-Day Skid
title_cn: 芯片股第三季度开局不利，连续两天下滑
summary: Semiconductor stocks are starting the third quarter with their worst two-day selloff in nearly a month.

title: Meta and SoftBank Expose Fault Lines in Growing Pile of AI Debt
title_cn: Meta 和软银暴露了不断增长的人工智能债务中的断层
summary: Moves this week from Meta Platforms Inc. and SoftBank Group Corp. are exposing what buyers in the credit market have been saying for a while: beneath the surface, the booming AI world is turning into a tale of two extremes.

title: EG’s Gas-Station Firm Cumberland Farms Files for US IPO
title_cn: EG 旗下加油站公司 Cumberland Farms 申请美国首次公开募股
summary: Cumberland Farms Ltd, the gas station and convenience store operator, filed for a US initial public offering, joining a rush of debuts that’s powered a record start to the year.

title: AI Debt Deluge Makes Credit Market Look Safer While Masking Risk
title_cn: 人工智能债务洪流使信贷市场看起来更安全，同时掩盖了风险
summary: On paper, the US corporate bond market is getting safer as more high-rated tech companies sell debt. Many investors fear that safety will prove illusory.

title: European Stocks Rise as Investors Rotate Away From Technology
title_cn: 随着投资者远离科技股，欧洲股市上涨
summary: European shares advanced as investors looked for alternatives to expensive tech shares in sectors that had been neglected by the market in recent months.

title: Genneia Files for First Argentine IPO in the US Since 2019
title_cn: Genneia 申请自 2019 年以来首次在美国进行阿根廷 IPO
summary: Power producer Genneia SA filed for an initial public offering in New York, trying to become the first Argentine company to launch in the US in at least seven years.

title: DOJ Probes Alleged Insider Trading Scheme That Stung Susquehanna
title_cn: 美国司法部调查涉嫌刺痛萨斯奎哈纳的内幕交易计划
summary: The Justice Department is looking into Susquehanna International Group’s allegations that unknown insider traders made $100 million on options bets placed ahead of a recent Chinese regulatory crackdown on cross-border brokerages, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Florida’s Brightline Taps Reserves to Make Key Bond Payments
title_cn: 佛罗里达州 Brightline 利用储备金支付关键债券
summary: Brightline, the debt-laden Florida private railroad, tapped reserves to made a July 1 interest payment due to holders of its senior municipal bonds and corporate notes, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 7/2/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 7 月 2 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The German Warship Reversal That Sank a Landmark Tank IPO
title_cn: 德国军舰的逆转导致了具有里程碑意义的坦克首次公开募股
summary: It’s been a rough few weeks for Europe’s ambitious rearmament efforts.

title: Jobs Report Signals Cooling Labor Market | Open Interest 7/2/2026
title_cn: 就业报告表明劳动力市场正在降温未平仓合约 7/2/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." US hiring slows sharply in June as Wall Street weighs what comes next. The Nasdaq fights back as Meta reshapes the global AI race, and OpenAI is reportedly considering giving the U.S. government a 5% stake. White House NEC Director Kevin Hassett reacts live to the jobs report, BlackRock's Rick Rieder breaks down the market impact, Revelio Labs explains how AI is creating jobs despite slower hiring, and Bridgepoint's $1.4 billion real estate bet points to a potential decade-long investment boom. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nuclear Reactor Powers Nvidia AI Chip in US First
title_cn: 核反应堆首次在美国为 Nvidia 人工智能芯片提供动力
summary: Valar Atomics, a California-based nuclear startup, generated power from an advanced reactor to run an Nvidia AI chip. While just a trickle of electricity was produced, it’s the first time a next-gen reactor has done so in the US. On the heels of a demonstration of Valar’s Ward 250 reactor connecting to the Nvidia Blackwell chip at the company’s site in Utah, Valar Atomics CEO Isaiah Taylor joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Shifts Strategy on Enterprise AI
title_cn: 微软改变企业人工智能战略
summary: Microsoft is mobilizing 6,000 employees in a new unit aimed at helping enterprise clients better utilize AI. Judson Althoff, CEO of Microsoft's commercial business, discusses what is driving this move and what impact Microsoft hopes to see. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IQM CEO Explains Quantum's Big Opportunity
title_cn: IQM 首席执行官解释量子的巨大机遇
summary: IQM Quantum Computers CEO Jan Goetz joined Open Interest to explain why his company chose a Nasdaq listing, why quantum computing could solve problems impossible for today's supercomputers, and why he believes the AI boom is accelerating the future of quantum technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kayne Anderson CEO on Bridgepoint Deal
title_cn: 凯恩·安德森 (Kayne Anderson) 首席执行官谈 Bridgepoint 交易
summary: Bridgepoint is making a $1.4 billion bet on US real estate. Kayne Anderson Real Estate Co-Founder and CEO Al Rabil says it's all about preparing for a "10-year supercycle." He joins Open Interest to explain why AI infrastructure, healthcare real estate, and long-term demographic trends are creating massive investment opportunities, and why the merger preserves his firm's autonomy while unlocking far more capital. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla's Big Beat Raises Questions
title_cn: 特斯拉的大节奏引发了疑问
summary: Tesla stunned Wall Street with a massive second-quarter delivery beat, While production also topped forecasts, the company offered virtually no commentary or explanation, leaving investors with more questions than answers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean AI Rout Drags Emerging Stocks to Three-Week Low
title_cn: 韩国人工智能溃败将新兴股市拖至三周低点
summary: Developing-world currencies rallied on Thursday after weaker-than-expected US employment data prompted investors to scale back bets that the Federal Reserve could begin raising interest rates as soon as this month.

title: Canada’s Pembina Advances Gas-Fired Data Center Project
title_cn: 加拿大 Pembina 推进燃气数据中心项目
summary: Pembina Pipeline Corp. will move ahead with a project build a C$4.6 billion ($3.2 billion) gas-fired electricity plant that will power a data center project in Alberta.

title: Microsoft Mobilizes 6,000 Workers to Help Customers Adopt AI
title_cn: 微软动员 6,000 名员工帮助客户采用人工智能
summary: Microsoft Corp. is setting up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses with the technical and strategic work of deploying artificial intelligence.

title: China’s Kling AI Raises $2 Billion to Expand AI Video
title_cn: 中国 Kling AI 融资 20 亿美元拓展 AI 视频业务
summary: China’s Kling AI has raised an initial $2 billion in venture capital funding as the spinoff from Kuaishou Technology seeks to expand its video AI operations.

title: AI Race Fuels New Fears of Crowded Trading
title_cn: 人工智能竞赛加剧了对拥挤交易的新担忧
summary:
Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday, tracking tech losses on Wall Street after Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to develop a business that would sell access to AI computing power raised worries about overcapacity.
Brian Belski, CEO and founder at Humilis Investments, discusses the recent tech sector rout and what stocks he is keeping an eye on. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Restricts Hiring, Travel to Fund ‘Significant’ AI Push
title_cn: SAP 限制招聘和差旅以资助“重大”人工智能推广
summary: SAP SE said it will cut back hiring and travel to save costs as Europe’s largest software company devotes more resources to developing artificial intelligence technologies and fending off new competitors.

title: Why Marlinspike Is Investing in America's Defense Boom
title_cn: 为什么马林斯派克投资于美国的国防繁荣
summary: Marlinspike Partners just raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to "rearm America," the latest sign that investors are piling into defense startups. Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, who also served six years as a US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest
title_cn: 随着人工智能矿产热潮引起人们的兴趣，刚果计划建立第一个股票市场
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the artificial intelligence buildout.

title: SpaceX Analyst Debut Set to Test $2.2 Trillion Valuation
title_cn: SpaceX 分析师首次亮相将测试 2.2 万亿美元估值
summary: Investors in SpaceX have been largely flying blind since the company’s record-breaking IPO last month, with few financial projections to help determine what the stock is actually worth.

title: South Africa’s Grocery War Shifts From Search to AI Conversation
title_cn: 南非的杂货战争从搜索转向人工智能对话
summary: South Africa’s online grocery battle is entering a new phase where the competition is no longer just about delivering groceries faster, but rather about making shopping itself almost disappear.

title: How Phone Culture Is Reshaping Chinese Society
title_cn: 手机文化如何重塑中国社会
summary:
Think smartphones dominate American culture? China may have taken the mobile-first lifestyle to another level.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Dan Wang, author of Breakneck, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how phone culture is reshaping Chinese society — from ordering a croissant for delivery in minutes to livestreaming shopping trips at the mall. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oilfield-Contractor Pay Hits Fresh Record as War Spurs Drilling
title_cn: 战争刺激钻探，油田承包商工资创下新纪录
summary: Wages for oilfield-services workers climbed for a third straight month in May, setting a fresh record as the Iran war drove up crude prices and companies increased drilling.

title: One Leveraged ETF Is Reshaping Trading in World's Top AI Memory Stock
title_cn: 一只杠杆 ETF 正在重塑全球顶级人工智能存储股票的交易
summary: A Hong Kong fund tied to SK Hynix has grown so large that it's beginning to move the stock it was built to track.

title: Billionaire Arnault Lauds Mathematics in €50 Million Alma Mater Gift
title_cn: 亿万富翁阿尔诺向母校赠送价值 5000 万欧元的数学礼物
summary: Bernard Arnault extolled the virtues of mathematics after pledging a record €50 million donation for a planned maths research institute at his alma mater, highlighting the discipline’s importance in a world increasingly shaped by AI.

title: AI Debt Binge Fueling Private Bond Market | The Close 7/1/2026
title_cn: 人工智能债务热潮推动私人债券市场|收盘价 7/1/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders, Jefferies Tech Sector Leader, Software/Internet Research Brent Thill, Union Square Advisors President & Co-Founder Ted Smith, Guggenheim Partners Senior Analyst of Retail & E-Commerce Simeon Siegel, Kayne Anderson Rudnick Portfolio Manager, Senior Research Analyst Julie Biel, Bank of America Co-Head of Global FICC Sales Rashaan Reid, Ramp Economist Ara Khazarian, The Conference Board Chief Economist Dana Peterson, & Chuck E. Cheese CEO Scott Drake.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood CEO on AI, Expansion & Trump Accounts
title_cn: Robinhood 首席执行官谈人工智能、扩张和特朗普账户
summary: Robinhood Markets is expanding in the UK and Europe with a new offering of agentic AI and perpetual futures, a type of derivative investment, with crypto trading expected to come to the UK "soon". It's part of a broader international push, even as the field of fin-tech apps in the UK and the EU grows increasingly competitive. Vlad Tenev - CEO and co-founder of investment platform joined Caroline Hepker and James Woolcock on Bloomberg radio to discuss the changes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Loses EU Top Court Fight Over €4.1 Billion Android Fine
title_cn: 谷歌在欧盟最高法院就 Android 系统罚款 41 亿欧元的诉讼中败诉
summary: Google lost its long-running fight against a €4.1 billion ($4.7 billion) European Union antitrust fine after the bloc’s top judges said regulators were right to punish the US giant for abusing Android’s market power.

title: Meta Looks to Make Money From Its AI Spending Binge
title_cn: Meta 希望通过其 AI 支出狂潮来赚钱
summary: The company is considering a cloud computing business to help generate revenue from AI

title: Skyroot Plans India’s First Private Sector Rocket Launch in July
title_cn: Skyroot 计划于 7 月发射印度首次私营部门火箭
summary: Skyroot Aerospace Pvt announced that it was gearing up for the debut launch of Vikram-1 — India’s first privately designed and developed orbital rocket — between July 12 and August 4, in what would be a critical milestone for the country’s first space unicorn after facing several delays.

title: Finance and Tech Cut 28,000 Jobs Monthly as AI Takes Hold
title_cn: 随着人工智能的兴起，金融和科技行业每月裁员 28,000 人
summary: Signs of slower hiring, attrition and companies deciding not to replace exiting workers.

title: OpenAI Proposes Giving 5% Stake to US Government: FT
title_cn: OpenAI 拟向美国政府授予 5% 股份：FT
summary: OpenAI has begun preliminary discussions about giving the US government a 5% stake in the ChatGPT-developer. The Financial Times reported that executives proposed the move as part of a broader arrangement under which Washington would hold 5% of each of the leading American AI developers. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Plans to Offer AI Compute in US at 10-Gigawatt Scale
title_cn: 软银计划在美国提供 10 吉瓦规模的人工智能计算
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. and its telecom unit will start renting AI computing resources to US companies next fiscal year, using a growing pipeline of data centers to compete with the likes of CoreWeave Inc. and Nebius Group NV.

title: Chip Stocks Slump Across Asia as Global Tech Selloff Intensifies
title_cn: 随着全球科技股抛售加剧，亚洲芯片股暴跌
summary: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday, tracking tech losses on Wall Street after Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to develop a business that would sell access to AI computing power raised worries about overcapacity.

title: German Reform Plan Could Lift 2027 GDP Above 1%, Merz Says
title_cn: 默茨称德国改革计划可能使 2027 年 GDP 增长 1% 以上
summary: The package of reforms just laid out by Germany’s coalition could lift the nation’s GDP above 1% in 2027, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz told ARD.

title: Can Trump Still Fire Lisa Cook After Her Supreme Court Win?
title_cn: 最高法院获胜后，特朗普还能解雇丽莎·库克吗？
summary: For now, Lisa Cook, the member of the Federal Reserve’s Board of Governors who Donald Trump attempted to fire in 2025, has scored another victory over the US president. A closely divided Supreme Court ruled on June 29 that she can stay in her job while she fights his bid to oust her over unproven mortgage fraud allegations that she denies. The justices didn’t make a decision about whether Trump ultimately could remove Cook from office, however, only that she had to receive a reasonable opportuni

title: US Moves to Halt Energy Savings Requirements Lambasted by Trump
title_cn: 美国暂停节能要求的举措遭到特朗普的严厉批评
summary: The Trump administration is moving to halt mandatory energy conservation standards for appliances ranging from refrigerators to washing machines, taking aim at some restrictions that have been criticized by the president himself.

title: Britain’s ‘Frustrating’ Search for New Chief to Fix Stats Crisis
title_cn: 英国“令人沮丧”地寻找新主席来解决统计危机
summary: One of Britain’s most senior statisticians said she’s frustrated by the long wait to install a new chief who can fix a crisis of confidence around the country’s economic data.

title: Protests Over Kushner-Linked Project Turn Violent in Albania
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚对库什纳相关项目的抗议演变成暴力活动
summary: Albanian police used water cannon and tear gas to disperse protesters in Tirana, in one of the most tense confrontations since rallies over coastal development projects linked to Jared Kushner began a month ago.

title: Chile endurece la supervisión migratoria tras caso de niños haitianos
title_cn: 海地儿童事件后智利加强移民监管
summary: Aunque los menores desaparecidos fueron localizados rápidamente, la conmoción por el caso provocó un mayor escrutinio sobre una comunidad que alguna vez encontró refugio en el país sudamericano.

title: Navy Withholds Northrop Payments Over Tardy Missile, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，海军扣留了诺斯罗普公司因迟到导弹而支付的款项
summary: The US Navy has withheld payments from Northrop Grumman Corp. over delays to fielding an upgraded air-to-ground missile designed to destroy enemy air-defense radar, congressional auditors said.

title: Mexico’s Export-Led Economy at Risk With Annual USMCA Reviews
title_cn: 墨西哥出口导向型经济面临年度 USMCA 审查的风险
summary: For years, Mexico’s pitch to investors rested on a simple promise: build here, sell to the US.

title: AI Anxiety, AI Cash Are Powering This Election Cycle
title_cn: 人工智能焦虑、人工智能现金正在推动这一选举周期
summary: “Claude, how should I vote in 2026?” On today’s Big Take podcast, the money, candidates and anxiety fueling the first AI election. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: De la Espriella Says Colombia Will Seek to Refinance Debt
title_cn: 德拉埃斯普里埃拉表示哥伦比亚将寻求债务再融资
summary: Colombian President-elect Abelardo de la Espriella said his incoming administration will seek to refinance the nation’s debt to extend maturities and lower borrowing costs.

title: European Nations Now Believe Some Hormuz Fees Are Inevitable
title_cn: 欧洲国家现在认为一些霍尔木兹收费是不可避免的
summary: Some leading European powers now accept that ships transiting the vital Strait of Hormuz will have to pay fees to Iran and Oman, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: First US Hypersonic Weapon Program Faces Further Delay, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，美国首个高超音速武器计划面临进一步推迟
summary: The US’s first hypersonic weapon, already at least two years late for deployment in the field, is facing delays yet again — this time over unresolved production issues, according to congressional auditors.

title: Boeing Made Progress on Air Force One Modifications, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，波音公司在空军一号改装方面取得了进展
summary: Boeing Co. reduced some of the technical challenges dogging its delayed delivery of two jets that will serve as Air Force One, according to congressional auditors.

title: Cuba’s Bold Free-Market Turn Fails to Convince US It’s Ready to Change
title_cn: 古巴大胆的自由市场转向未能让美国相信它已做好改变的准备
summary: Cuba is struggling to convince the Trump administration that its most ambitious economic reforms in decades are enough to spark the changes the US is demanding.

title: India Plans to Expand Oil Reserves to Guard Against Price Spikes
title_cn: 印度计划扩大石油储备以防范价格飙升
summary: India plans to build larger oil inventories, expand storage capacity and deepen supply partnerships to hedge against the kind of price volatility seen during the Iran war.

title: Death Toll Rises to 20 After Massive Russian Air Attack on Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯大规模空袭基辅后死亡人数上升至20人
summary: The number of fatalities increased to 20 in Kyiv following overnight Russian missile and drone attacks on the Ukrainian capital that were among the most intense of the year so far.

title: Ocasio-Cortez Backs Progressive El-Sayed in Michigan Senate Race
title_cn: 奥卡西奥-科尔特斯在密歇根州参议员竞选中支持进步派埃尔-赛义德
summary: Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has endorsed Michigan candidate Abdul El-Sayed in that state’s US Senate primary, throwing another progressive voice behind him in the race to face off against Republican Mike Rogers.

title: South Africa to Probe Ex-Leader Zuma as He Meets Gupta Brother
title_cn: 南非将调查前领导人祖马会见古普塔兄弟
summary: South Africa’s Department of International Relations will probe Jacob Zuma’s visit to India where he met Ajay Gupta, who alongside his brothers is accused of orchestrating widespread government corruption during the former president’s time in office.

title: AI Anxiety, AI Cash Are Powering This Election Cycle (Video)
title_cn: 人工智能焦虑、人工智能现金正在推动这一选举周期（视频）

title: EU Officials Fear Leaders Will Balk in Confronting China
title_cn: 欧盟官员担心领导人在对抗中国时会犹豫不决
summary: The European Union’s latest bid to reset its trade and economic relationship with China is already floundering, with some member states and officials involved in the planning skeptical that the bloc is ready to take decisive action should diplomacy fail.

title: Germany Readies €12 Billion Contract for Warships From TKMS
title_cn: 德国准备与 TKMS 签订价值 120 亿欧元的军舰合同
summary: German lawmakers are set to approve a €12 billion ($13.7 billion) order of up to eight submarine-hunting frigates from defense manufacturer TKMS AG& Co. KGaA in one of the biggest military procurements for Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s ruling coalition this year.

title: Takaichi, Modi Deepen Economic Ties to Cut Reliance on China
title_cn: 高市和莫迪深化经济联系以减少对中国的依赖
summary: India and Japan agreed to deepen cooperation on energy, technology and defense during Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s first official visit to New Delhi, as the two Asian powers seek to reduce their dependence on China and build more resilient supply chains.

title: Flood Re to Cut Insurance Payouts to Richest UK Households
title_cn: 洪水再保险将削减英国最富有家庭的保险支出
summary: The UK’s flood insurer of last resort is unfairly favoring wealthier households and will be reformed to reduce the burden of multimillion-pound payouts, the government said Wednesday.

title: Democrats Gain Ground in Tough Battle for Senate
title_cn: 民主党在参议院的激烈争夺中取得进展
summary: A spate of new polling makes the race look more competitive than expected

title: Nigeria’s Reforms Revered by Markets Become Political Problem for Tinubu
title_cn: 尼日利亚受到市场推崇的改革成为蒂努布的政治问题
summary: Seated beneath a large red canvas umbrella outside Nigeria’s main stock exchange in Lagos, Sulaimon Isiaka watches traders, bankers and executives stream past his newspaper stand each day.

title: Starmer Gives Apology But No Payments to Forced Adoption Victims
title_cn: 斯塔默道歉但没有向强迫收养受害者付款
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer apologized to the victims of decades of forced adoptions in Britain’s post-war period, but stopped short of offering immediate compensation to affected mothers and their offspring.

title: Russia Indicates Ukraine Fired Long-Range Ballistic Missile
title_cn: 俄罗斯表示乌克兰发射了远程弹道导弹
summary: Russia indicated that Ukraine may have used a long-range ballistic missile in combat for the first time.

title: Khamenei’s Funeral Draws Chinese and Russian Dignitaries to Iran
title_cn: 哈梅内伊葬礼吸引中俄政要前往伊朗
summary: Iran is set to host foreign officials from key backers including China and Russia this weekend for the funeral of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

title: South Africa’s DA Head Vows to Enforce Consultation in Coalition
title_cn: 南非发展议程负责人誓言加强联合磋商
summary: The leader of the Democratic Alliance, South Africa’s second-largest political party, will enforce broader consultation in the nation’s ruling coalition as he reiterated his commitment to the alliance.

title: NZ’s Peters Fears Potential Curbs on Indian Migration
title_cn: 新西兰总理彼得斯担心印度移民可能受到限制
summary: New Zealand is preparing to tighten immigration rules for Indian nationals, a move Foreign Minister Winston Peters says could harm relations between the two nations, the Post reported Thursday, citing a person it didn’t identify.
